parameters.query:
SELECT
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'email_delivery_mode' THEN value END) AS email_delivery_mode,
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'email_test_recipient' THEN value END) AS email_test_recipient,
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'email_sender_name' THEN value END) AS email_sender_name,
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'email_reply_to' THEN value END) AS email_reply_to,
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'email_signature_template_key' THEN value END) AS email_signature_template_key,
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'n8n_base_url' THEN value END) AS n8n_base_url
FROM public.global_settings
WHERE key IN ('email_delivery_mode', 'email_test_recipient', 'email_sender_name', 'email_reply_to', 'email_signature_template_key', 'n8n_base_url');

parameters.jsCode:
const input = $('Resolve Preview Request').first()?.json ?? {};
const sqlLiteral = (value) => "'" + String(value ?? '').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'";
const sql = [
  'WITH selected_case AS (',
  '  SELECT * FROM public.cases WHERE id = ' + sqlLiteral(input.case_id) + '::uuid',
  '), message_template AS (',
  '  SELECT template_key, template_name, subject_template, text_template, html_template',
  '  FROM public.email_templates',
  '  WHERE template_key = ' + sqlLiteral(input.template_key) + ' AND template_type = 0 AND is_active = true',
  '  LIMIT 1',
  '), signature_template AS (',
  '  SELECT template_key, template_name, text_template, html_template',
  '  FROM public.email_templates',
  '  WHERE template_key = ' + sqlLiteral(input.signature_template_key) + ' AND template_type = 2 AND is_active = true',
  '  LIMIT 1',
  ')',
  'SELECT',
  "  COALESCE((SELECT to_jsonb(selected_case) FROM selected_case), '{}'::jsonb) AS case_row,",
  '  (SELECT template_key FROM message_template) AS template_key,',
  "  (SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(template_name, ''), template_key) FROM message_template) AS template_name,",
  '  (SELECT subject_template FROM message_template) AS subject_template,',
  '  (SELECT text_template FROM message_template) AS text_template,',
  '  (SELECT html_template FROM message_template) AS html_template,',
  '  (SELECT template_key FROM signature_template) AS signature_template_key,',
  "  (SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(template_name, ''), template_key) FROM signature_template) AS signature_template_name,",
  '  (SELECT text_template FROM signature_template) AS signature_text_template,',
  '  (SELECT html_template FROM signature_template) AS signature_html_template,',
  '  CASE',
  "    WHEN NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM selected_case) THEN 'Case not found.'",
  "    WHEN NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM message_template) THEN 'Message template was not found.'",
  "    WHEN NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM signature_template) THEN 'Signature template was not found.'",
  '    ELSE NULL',
  '  END AS error_message'
].join('\n');
return [{ json: { ...input, sql } }];
